ddt:Target.Name: ECU HITACHI X91 6x50
ddt:Target.Description:
ESSENCE - WB56 / EWR21 Véhicules : X91 Motorisations : M4R / V4Y Logiciels : 6650 / 6450 et ulterieurs Co-auteurs : Daisuke WATANABE Tel. : 77560 daisuke.watanabe-renexter@renault.com Rémy COUTURIER Tel. : 78869 remy.couturier-renexter@renault.com Nicolas DABADIE Tel : 78939 nicolas.dabadie-renexter@renault.com
13/03/2006 Modification par N Dabadie sur demande L. ERLIGMANN et C. CANDAS concernant les DEVICES.
20/03/2006 Suppression des 2 devices en doublon : 48 = RrO2 heater (bank1) 48 = A/F heater (bank 1) 80 = RrO2 heater (bank2) 80 = A/F heater (bank 2)
Modification des noms de requête type DataRead.VTCDUTY(L) or VTCDUTY®)
Changement des tailles des dataIdentifier avec une mauvaise longueur :3 octets
Passe complete sur les DIDs
21/03/2006 Suppression des requetes non utilisées Ajouts de données associées a chaque organe

Item.Text: Assembly line testing and after sales session

Data.Name: diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
diag. byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
fan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine management
fan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine management
Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type OBD codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank1)
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank1)
Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank2)
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank2)
Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch
One of brake switch failure OR Both of brake switch infered failure
No coherence between displayed speed and real speed
EEP- ROM reading diagnosis (the main thing)
EEP- ROM writng diagnosis (the main thing)
Maximum delay for agb torque request
Alternator power OR NEUT /SW value transmitted by USM

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Steering wheel switches connection detection. Stored in E2PROM
The vehicle speed used for CC/SL is in mph
Vehicle speed received on the CAN network not available
The automatic gearbox transmits a limphome or invalid or unexpected gear value

Item.Text: Not limphome or invalid or unexpected gear value
Limphome or invalid or unexpected gear value

Data.Name: The automatic gearbox is on reverse position
The automatic gearbox is on neutral position
The automatic gearbox is not coupled to the engine
The clutch pedal status information is unavailable
The brake status information is absent
Air conditionning pressure detection. Stored in E2PROM
Input of the cruise control main switch
Input of the speed limiter main switch
Detect the cruise control switch connection. Stored in E2PROM
Detect the speed limiter switch connection. Stored in E2PROM
Detected failure : Cruise Control Main Switch Coherence
Detected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch open circuit
Detected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch invalid value
Displayed vehicle speed received on the CAN network not available
In manual gearbox the reverse position is engaged
Gearbox is on the neutral position (information from CAN)
Braking detected with the brake switches
Detect the speed distance limiter option. Stored in E2PROM
Detect cruise control option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROM
Accelerator pedal voltage - track 1
Data.Comment: Tension de la pédale d'accelération - piste 1

Data.Name: Accelerator pedal voltage - track 2
Data.Comment: Tension de la pédale d'accelération - piste 2

Data.Comment: Etat de la pédale de frein - CAN

Data.Name: Brake switch - wire
Data.Comment: Etat de la pédale de frein - filaire

Data.Name: MIL lamp request state
Data.Comment: Etat de la demande d'allumage du voyant MIL

Data.Name: Camshaft angular shift setpoint
Data.Comment: Consigne de décalage de l'arbre à cames

Data.Name: Camshaft angular shift - bank 2
Data.Comment: Décalage de l'arbre à cames - banc 2

Data.Name: Camshaft angular shift PWM command
Data.Comment: Commande RCO de décalage de l'arbre à cames

Data.Name: Camshaft angular shift PWM command - bank 2
Data.Comment: Commande RCO de décalage de l'arbre à cames - banc 2

Data.Comment: RV/LV - Tension de la boutonnerie volant

Data.Comment: Etat du bouton M/A du régulateur de vitesse

Data.Name: Speed limiter On/Off button state
Data.Comment: Etat du bouton M/A du limiteur de vitesse

Data.Name: Configuration - CCSL steering wheel push buttons

Data.Comment: Etat de la pédale d'embrayage - fin de course

Data.Name: Cranking autorisation status
Data.Comment: Etat de l'autorisation de démarrage moteur

Data.Name: Cranking forbidden by ECM state
Data.Comment: Etat de l'interdiction de démarrage moteur par l'ECM

Data.Name: CCSL - Steering wheel push buttons state
Data.Comment: RV/LV - Etat de la boutonnerie volant

Data.Name: Inlet throttle position sensor voltage
Data.Comment: Tension capteur de la position du volet d'admission

Data.Name: Throttle valve position sensor voltage - track 1
Data.Comment: Tension capteur de la position du papillon - piste 1

Data.Name: Throttle valve position sensor voltage - track 2
Data.Comment: Tension capteur de la position du papillon - piste 2

Data.Comment: Tension sonde à oxygène amont catalyseur

Data.Comment: Tension sonde à oxygène aval catalyseur

Data.Name: Fuel low level
Data.Comment: Etat du niveau faible de carburant

Data.Name: Fuel pump command state
Data.Comment: Etat de la commande pompe à carburant

Data.Name: Late post injection desired time
Data.Comment: Phasage temporel pour la late post injection

Data.Name: Throttle valve offset - min position - track 1
Data.Comment: Throttle valve offset - min position - track 1

Data.Name: Throttle valve offset - min position - track 2
Data.Comment: Throttle valve offset - min position - track 2

test of readiness codes status & readiness codes completed

Data.Name: Counter of inconsistencies between accelerator pedal and brake
Data.Comment: Compteur d'incohérences entre la pédale d'accélération et le frein

Data.Name: Bit indicating that the immobiliser diagnosis is available
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to ECM

Item.Text: Engine not running due to ECM

Data.Name: Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM secure mode

Item.Text: BCM secure mode not blocking the engine
Engine not running due to BCM secure mode

Data.Name: Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM authorization

Item.Text: BCM authorization not blocking the engine
Engine not running due to BCM authorization

Data.Name: Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to a CAN network problem with BCM

Item.Text: No CAN network problem with BCM blocking the engine

Data.Name: Connection status with ECU N°1 (Only for LPG ECU)
High speed engine fan delayed command
Low speed engine fan delayed command
Air conditionning pressure sensor short circuit memorised failure
Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit memorised failure
Air conditionning pressure sensor short circuit detected failure
Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit detected failure
Diesel Pre heating lamp commande PRECHOUT
Accel pedal depressed beyond mechanical hard point
Engine control request for speed limiter system deactivation
Engine control request for speed limiter abnormal deactivation
Engine control request for cruise control system deactivation
Engine control request for cruise control abnormal deactivation
Sudden braking detected for cruise control
State of the steering wheel buttons : not filtered
ACC frame presence detection with security on configuration detection
Speed limiter option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROM
Begin stroke clutch switch connection detection. Stored in E2PROM
Wired open active brake switch input
State of the begin stroke clutch pedal. Physical input.
Compilation of all the cru/sl normal deactivations due to system causes. Saved in E2PROM
Compilation of all the cru/sl normal causes of deactivation
Transmission ratio for manual gearbox calculated by the engine control unit
CCSL Steering Wheel Command Switched blocked button detected failure
Automatic or manual parking braking detected
Counter : increment at each START button push
Carrier of all the failures which cause CC failure
Carrier of all the failures which cause CC/SL failure
Maximum duration of RESUME button press
Maximum duration of SET+ button press
Maximum duration of SET- button press
Maximum duration of SUSPEND button press
Maximum value of counter for detection of blocked button. Saved in E2PROM
Input of the cruise control and speed limiter steering wheel push buttons

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: Failures.Session
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page request : define the session to use for current ECU

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

DataItem.Name: Bit indicating that the immobiliser diagnosis is available
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to ECM
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM secure mode
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM authorization
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to a CAN network problem with BCM
Connection status with ECU N°1 (Only for LPG ECU)
diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
diag. byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
High speed engine fan delayed command
Low speed engine fan delayed command
fan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine management
fan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine management
Air conditionning pressure detection. Stored in E2PROM
Air conditionning pressure sensor short circuit memorised failure
Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit memorised failure
Air conditionning pressure sensor short circuit detected failure
Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit detected failure
Diesel Pre heating lamp commande PRECHOUT
Accel pedal depressed beyond mechanical hard point
Engine control request for speed limiter system deactivation
Engine control request for speed limiter abnormal deactivation
Engine control request for cruise control system deactivation
Engine control request for cruise control abnormal deactivation
Sudden braking detected for cruise control
State of the steering wheel buttons : not filtered
Input of the cruise control main switch
Input of the speed limiter main switch
ACC frame presence detection with security on configuration detection
Detect the cruise control switch connection. Stored in E2PROM
Detect cruise control option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROM
Detect the speed limiter switch connection. Stored in E2PROM
Steering wheel switches connection detection. Stored in E2PROM
Speed limiter option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROM
Detect the speed distance limiter option. Stored in E2PROM
Begin stroke clutch switch connection detection. Stored in E2PROM
Wired open active brake switch input
State of the begin stroke clutch pedal. Physical input.
Compilation of all the cru/sl normal deactivations due to system causes. Saved in E2PROM
Compilation of all the cru/sl normal causes of deactivation
Transmission ratio for manual gearbox calculated by the engine control unit
CCSL Steering Wheel Command Switched blocked button detected failure
Detected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch invalid value
Detected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch open circuit
Detected failure : Cruise Control Main Switch Coherence
The vehicle speed used for CC/SL is in mph
Displayed vehicle speed received on the CAN network not available
In manual gearbox the reverse position is engaged
Vehicle speed received on the CAN network not available
Automatic or manual parking braking detected
Gearbox is on the neutral position (information from CAN)
The automatic gearbox transmits a limphome or invalid or unexpected gear value
The automatic gearbox is on reverse position
The automatic gearbox is on neutral position
The automatic gearbox is not coupled to the engine
The clutch pedal status information is unavailable
The brake status information is absent
Braking detected with the brake switches
Counter : increment at each START button push
Carrier of all the failures which cause CC failure
Carrier of all the failures which cause CC/SL failure
Maximum duration of RESUME button press
Maximum duration of SET+ button press
Maximum duration of SET- button press
Maximum duration of SUSPEND button press
Maximum value of counter for detection of blocked button. Saved in E2PROM
Input of the cruise control and speed limiter steering wheel push buttons

Device.Name: One of brake switch failure OR Both of brake switch infered failure
EEP- ROM writng diagnosis (the main thing)
EEP- ROM reading diagnosis (the main thing)
No coherence between displayed speed and real speed

DeviceData.Name: Throttle valve position sensor voltage - track 2
Throttle valve offset - min position - track 2
Throttle valve position sensor voltage - track 1
Throttle valve offset - min position - track 1

Device.Name: Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch

DeviceData.Name: CCSL - Steering wheel push buttons voltage
Configuration - CCSL steering wheel push buttons
CCSL - Steering wheel push buttons state
Camshaft angular shift PWM command - bank 2

Device.Name: Alternator power OR NEUT /SW value transmitted by USM

DeviceData.Name: Clutch pedal state - minimum travel - CAN

Device.Name: Maximum delay for agb torque request
A/F heater or RrO2 heater (bank2)
Device.Mnemonic: Chauffeur sonde A/F ou chauffeur sonde O2 aval

Device.Name: A/F heater or RrO2 heater (bank1)
Device.Mnemonic: Chauffeur sonde A/F ou chauffeur sonde 02 aval

Device.Name: Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank1)
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank1)
Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank2)
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank2)

DeviceData.Name: Catalyst exhaust gas upstream oxygen sensor voltage
Bit indicating that the immobiliser diagnosis is available
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to ECM
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM secure mode
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM authorization
Immobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to a CAN network problem with BCM
Connection status with ECU N°1 (Only for LPG ECU)
diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
diag. byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame

Low speed engine fan delayed command
fan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine management
fan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine management

Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit memorised failure

Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit detected failure

State of the steering wheel buttons : not filtered

State of the begin stroke clutch pedal. Physical input.
Compilation of all the cru/sl normal deactivations due to system causes. Saved in E2PROM
Compilation of all the cru/sl normal causes of deactivation
Transmission ratio for manual gearbox calculated by the engine control unit

Detected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch invalid value
Detected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch open circuit
Detected failure : Cruise Control Main Switch Coherence
The vehicle speed used for CC/SL is in mph
Displayed vehicle speed received on the CAN network not available
In manual gearbox the reverse position is engaged
Vehicle speed received on the CAN network not available
Automatic or manual parking braking detected
Gearbox is on the neutral position (information from CAN)
The automatic gearbox transmits a limphome or invalid or unexpected gear value
The automatic gearbox is on reverse position
The automatic gearbox is on neutral position
The automatic gearbox is not coupled to the engine
The clutch pedal status information is unavailable
The brake status information is absent
Braking detected with the brake switches

Carrier of all the failures which cause CC failure
Carrier of all the failures which cause CC/SL failure
